info.title: FilesHub API
info.summary: Zero-cost file storage, email sending, and developer utilities over HTTP.
info.description: FilesHub is a file-storage and developer-utility API. Upload files and get a stable public URL, send transactional email from verified domains, run background jobs, and call 40+ utility groups — all authenticated with a per-project X-API-Key header. This spec covers the core integration surface (objects, emails, templates, schedules, jobs, version/health). The full list of stateless developer utilities is summarized at https://fileshub-docs.zaions.com/api/utilities-index. Docs: https://fileshub-docs.zaions.com.

servers.description: Versioned API (objects, emails, jobs, schedules, templates)

tags.name: Emails
tags.description: Send email, manage templates and recurring schedules

tags.name: Status
tags.description: Public health and deploy-version endpoints (no auth, at /api not /api/v1)

tags.name: Management API
tags.description: Account-wide control plane: manage projects, API keys and origin restrictions with an fh_pat_ access token.

post.description: Upload a multipart file. Returns 201 with the object's ULID, public URL, and metadata.

file.description: The file to store (max upload size configurable, default 10 MB).

visibility.description: Access control. Omitted => private. Integrations send public.

expires_in_days.description: Auto-delete this many days from now.

expires_at.description: Auto-delete at this absolute time (wins over expires_in_days).

get.description: Streams the file. Public objects need no key; private objects require a read key from the same project.

post.description: Send one transactional email (raw or template). Queued by default (202 + job_id); pass queue=false for a synchronous 201.

503.description: Requested domain temporarily without capacity; retry with backoff.

patch.description: Send is_active=false to pause, true to resume; or update any create field.

post.description: Send this schedule's run immediately, off-cadence.

servers.description: Root API (health/version live here, not under /api/v1)
Root API (health/version live here, not under /api/v1)

get.description: Confirm the token works and learn its scope. The intended first call.
Projects this token may manage. Supports ?q= (name/slug), ?status=, pagination.

post.description: Create a new project. The slug is generated from the name when omitted.

get.description: Fetch one project by id, public_id, or slug (includes a summary api_keys list).

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

patch.description: Update name, slug, status, or notes.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

delete.description: Delete a project; cascades its api keys, origins, stored objects and audit logs.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

get.description: List a project's API keys (safe representation — no secrets).

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

post.description: Create a key and return its plaintext once, flat under data. Every omitted boolean defaults to false.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

allow_no_origin.description: Restricted keys only: let through requests that carry no Origin and no X-App-Id, so a backend/Worker/CLI/Flutter consumer can use a restricted key. Requests that DO send an Origin are still matched against the allowlist.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

patch.description: Update name, permissions, restricted, limits, or is_active.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

allow_no_origin.description: Restricted keys only: let through requests that carry no Origin and no X-App-Id, so a backend/Worker/CLI/Flutter consumer can use a restricted key. Requests that DO send an Origin are still matched against the allowlist.

delete.description: Delete a key; its origins cascade.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

post.description: Issue a new secret; the old key stops working immediately. Returns the new plaintext_key.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

post.description: Re-read the stored plaintext. 409 PLAINTEXT_UNAVAILABLE for legacy keys — rotate instead.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

get.description: List an API key's allowed origins.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

post.description: Add an allowed origin. Domains are validated against the scheme+port policy and stored canonically (example.com -> https://example.com). Browser extensions use type=domain with an extension scheme, where the host is the extension id: chrome-extension://<id> (also moz-extension://, safari-web-extension://), no port and no wildcard. Origins configured platform-wide by an administrator (global origins) also apply to every restricted key and are not listed here.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

patch.description: Change value and/or fingerprints. Type is immutable.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project id, ULID public_id, or slug.

post.description: Reverse-lookup an fh_live_ key: returns its project, safe representation, and origins. 404 if unknown or out of scope.

get.description: Safe summaries (no secret values). Gated by the token's `can_manage_supabase` scope.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Match on name, url or organization.

200.description: Paginated list of Supabase project summaries

get.summary: Read one Supabase project (no secret values)
get.description: Summary plus derived endpoints and non-secret config. `{supabaseProject}` is the numeric id or the project ref. Gated by `can_manage_supabase`.

post.summary: Reveal a Supabase project's secrets + env blocks
post.description: Detail plus every stored secret plus ready-to-paste React/Node/Laravel .env blocks. Recorded on every call. Gated by `can_manage_supabase`.

200.description: Supabase project with secrets and env blocks

ApiKeyHeader.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyHeader.description: Per-project API key. Send on every authenticated request.

BearerAuth.description: User-level access token (prefix fh_pat_) for the Public Management API. Send as "Authorization: Bearer fh_pat_...". Server / CLI only — never a browser. The "X-Access-Token" header is accepted as a fallback.

AppId.name: X-App-Id
AppId.description: Required only for app-restricted keys: the Android package or iOS bundle id (X-Android-Package is an accepted alias).

AndroidCert.name: X-Android-Cert
AndroidCert.description: Android signing-cert fingerprint (SHA-256 or SHA-1). Required when the key's android origin pins certificate fingerprints. See https://fileshub-docs.zaions.com/getting-started/api-key-restrictions.

Forbidden.description: Key lacks the required scope, or origin/app not allowed.

domain.description: Verified sending domain. Omitted => admin default with fallback.

scheduled_at.description: Send once at a future time.

slug.description: Immutable once set; auto-generated from name if omitted.

EmailTemplateUpdate.description: Any subset of the create fields except slug (immutable).

ApiKeySafe.description: API key without the hash or plaintext.

allow_no_origin.description: Restricted keys only: allow requests that send no Origin and no X-App-Id (server/CLI/native consumers).

value.description: Canonical origin for domains (scheme://host[:port]); package/bundle id for android/ios.

can_manage_supabase.description: Whether the token may read the Supabase project vault (separate axis from the project scope; off by default).

plaintext_key.description: The full key. Shown only by create, rotate and reveal.

ApiKeyWithSecret.description: The key fields flat, plus the plaintext. Create and rotate previously nested this under data.api_key; both are flat as of 2026-07-18.

SupabaseProjectSummary.description: Safe list/summary view of a registered Supabase project. No secret values; `has` flags say which secrets a reveal would return.

ref.description: The `<ref>` label of a `<ref>.supabase.co` URL; null for self-hosted/custom-domain.

has.description: Presence flags per secret column, tested WITHOUT decrypting.

endpoints.description: Derived from the project URL, not stored. `realtime`/`dashboard` are null when there is no ref.

allOf.description: Detail plus every stored secret and ready-to-paste env blocks. An unreadable secret (e.g. encrypted under a rotated APP_KEY) comes back null.

env.description: Ready-to-paste .env fragments; a block absent when it would be empty.
